flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: Bookingsflow.SUB_PKA_BookSingle
NODES=13; EDGES=12
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve BookingTracker from Bookingsflow.BookingTracker
3. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow Bookingsflow.SUB_CleanPKAFields_Single
4. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow Bookingsflow.SUB_PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_SetWorkingTime_Single -> PersoneelsKostenAllocatie
5. DECISION OPEN? expression=$PersoneelsKostenAllocatie/RequestStatus = 'OPEN'
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow Bookingsflow.SUB_Booking_PKASingle -> Variable
  8. DECISION Success? expression=$PersoneelsKostenAllocatie/RequestPostingStatus = 'POSTED'
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    10. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Request has been succesfully booked., type=Information, blocking=true)
    11. END
  12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    13. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    14. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Request can't be booked., type=Information, blocking=true)
    15. END
16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  17. REF ExclusiveMerge

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: Bookingsflow.SUB_PrepareAllocationToBook
NODES=29; EDGES=19
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Remarks='Ready for Posting'
3. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Employee from Masterdata.Employee
4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ResponsibleCostCenter_Active from Masterdata.ResponsibleCostCenter
5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Rate_Amount from Masterdata.ActualRate
6. DECISION Rate_Amount > 0 expression=if $Rate_Amount != empty then $Rate_Amount/Value > 0 else false
7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  8. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegelList_ToCheck over association PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_PersoneelsKostenAllocatie from AllocationToCheck
  9. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegelList_SenderIsReceiver, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  10. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=SumPercentage, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  11. DECISION sender=receiver is not fully booked expression=if $SumPercentage != empty then $SumPercentage < 100 else true
  12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    13. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable RemarkLine=''
    14. LOOP iterate PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegelList_ToCheck as PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck
      15. LOOP BODY
        16. DECISION Receiver is WBS? expression=$PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck/TWK.PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_WBSElement != empty
        17. DECISION Receiver aanwezig? expression=$PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck/ReceiverCostCenter != empty or $PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck/ReceiverW...
        18. DECISION Correct WBS? expression=$ReceivingWBS!= empty and $ReceivingWBS/toDelete = false
        19. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ReceivingResponsibleCostCenter over association PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_Receiver_ResponsibleCostCenter from PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck
        20. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable RemarkLine=$RemarkLine+' - WBS is niet vrijgegeven'
        21. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        22. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        23. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable CCisBlocked=false
        24. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ReceivingWBS over association PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_WBSElement from PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck
        25. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck (Remarks='Ready for Posting'; refreshInClient=false)
        26. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ProcessingStatus=''
        27. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        28. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable RemarkLine=$RemarkLine+' - Kostenplaats closed for secondary posting'
        29. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        30. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ReceivingResponsibleCostCenter_DB from Masterdata.ResponsibleCostCenter
        31. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        32. DECISION Open voor secondary cost posting expression=$CCisBlocked = false
        33. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        34. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable CCisBlocked=$ReceivingResponsibleCostCenter_DB/IsBlkdForSecondaryCostsPosting
        35. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck (Remarks='geen ontvangend costcenter of WSB'; refreshInClient=false)
        36. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ProcessingStatus=$ReceivingWBS/ProcessingStatus
        37. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable CCisBlocked=$ReceivingResponsibleCostCenter/IsBlkdForSecondaryCostsPosting
        38. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve ReceiverWBS_DB from TWK.WBSElement
        39. DECISION FOund? expression=$ReceivingResponsibleCostCenter != empty
        40. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck (Remarks='receiving costcenter niet open voor secondary post costing'; refreshInClient=false)
        41. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable RemarkLine=$RemarkLine+' - Geen ontvangende WBS of kostenplaats gevonden'
        42. DECISION Receiver is costcenter? expression=$PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck/ReceiverCostCenter != empty and $PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck/Receiver...
        43. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegel_ToCheck (Remarks='WBS is niet vrijgegeven'; refreshInClient=false)
        44. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ProcessingStatus=$ReceiverWBS_DB/ProcessingStatus
        45. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        46. DECISION WBS is vrijgegeven expression=$ProcessingStatus = '12' or $ProcessingStatus = '10'
    47. ACTION CommitAction: commit PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegelList_ToCheck (refreshInClient=false, withEvents=false)
    48. DECISION RemarkLine empty? expression=$RemarkLine = ''
    49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      50. END
    51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      52. END
  53. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    54. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Remarks='Zendende kostenplaats is gelijk aan ontvangende kostenplaats'
    55. END
56. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  57. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable Remarks='Er is geen tarief aanwezig of tarief is niet groter dan 0'
  58. END

nodes.label: 10-8-2023 KF: If there are no queued actions left the whole run is completed, and we can update the BookingTracker and log that the run is done.

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: Bookingsflow.SUB_Queue_AllocationRunBooking_CheckIfCompleted
NODES=17; EDGES=13
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve QueuedTaskList_1 from System.QueuedTask
3. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow TaskQueueHelpers.DS_RetrieveQueueCounts -> QueueCountList
4. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=NewQueueCountList, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
5. ACTION ListOperationAction: ListOperationAction (output=Queue, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
6. DECISION No queued actions? expression=$Queue/WaitingCount = 0
7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  9. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change BookingTracker (AllocationStatus=Bookingsflow.SimulationFlowStatus.Open, CurrentlyRunningSimulation=empty; refreshInClient=true)
  10. ACTION LogMessageAction: LogMessageAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  11. END
12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  13. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve QueuedTaskList from System.QueuedTask
  14. DECISION Finished? expression=$QueuedTaskList = empty
  15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    16. REF ExclusiveMerge
  17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    18. END

FLOW Microflow: Bookingsflow.SUB_RunSimulation
NODES=16; EDGES=14
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Year=parseInteger(formatDateTime($BookingsDate, 'yyyy'))
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Month=parseInteger(formatDateTime($BookingsDate, 'MM'))
4. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable SimulationStatus_PASS='SIMULATION_PASS'
5. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable SimulationStatus_FAIL='SIMULATION_FAIL'
6. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegelList_ToCheck over association PersoneelsKostenAllocatieRegel_PersoneelsKostenAllocatie from PersoneelsKostenAllocatie
7. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow Bookingsflow.SUB_AllocationChecks -> CheckResult
8. DECISION 'Ready for Posting' expression=$CheckResult = 'Ready for Posting'
9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  10. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelsKostenAllocatie (RequestPostingStatus=$SimulationStatus_PASS, Remarks=$CheckResult; refreshInClient=false)
  11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  12. ACTION CommitAction: commit PersoneelskostenAllocatieRegelList_ToCheck (refreshInClient=false, withEvents=false)
  13. ACTION CommitAction: commit PersoneelsKostenAllocatie (refreshInClient=false, withEvents=false)
  14. END
15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  16. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change PersoneelsKostenAllocatie (RequestPostingStatus=$SimulationStatus_FAIL, Remarks=$CheckResult; refreshInClient=false)
  17. REF ExclusiveMerge
